entity.parent_entity is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Parent entities are relation context. Suggested relation: part_of_agency.

payload.subject: Key Performance Metric Report

payload.description: A review of the prior year's performance of railroad will be provided to the Committee.
The Agency will present its revised 2026 Financial Plan reflecting the 2026 Adopted Budget and updated Financial Plan.
Annual report to the Committee on system-wide reliability and availability for elevators and escalators throughout the system.
A quarterly report to the Committee on key EEO and Human Resources indicators relating to MNR's EEO and Diversity efforts.
The Committee will be advised of the upcoming schedule changes for the Railroad.
A report on Metro-North's ridership trends during 2025 based on monthly ticket sales data and train ridership counts.

tool_args.label: May 2026 - Final Review of 2025 Operating Budget Results

payload.description: A review of the prior year's budget results and their implications for current and future budget performance.
payload.event_name: Final Review of 2025 Operating Budget Results

payload.description: A quarterly report to the Committee on key EEO and Human Resources indicators relating to MNR's EEO and Diversity efforts.
The Committee will be advised of the Agency's key operating performance metrics and indicators for the first half of 2026.
Public comment will be accepted on the 2027 Budget.
The agency will provide the 2026 Mid-Year Forecast financial information for revenue and expense by month.
The agency will provide a comprehensive report on Safety/Security.
A quarterly report on key EEO and Human Resources indicators relating to MNR's EEO and Diversity efforts.
The Committee will be advised of the upcoming schedule changes for the Railroad.
Public comment will be accepted on the 2027 Budget.
The Committee Chair will present a draft Metro-North Committee Work Plan for 2027.
The Committee will recommend action to the Board on the Final Proposed Budget for 2027.

tool_args.label: December 2026 - Approval of 2027 Committee Work Plan

payload.description: The Committee will approve the Proposed Metro-North Railroad Committee Work Plan for 2027.
A quarterly report on key EEO and Human Resources indicators relating to MNR's EEO and Diversity efforts.
Annual review and approval of the MNR Committee Charter.

tool_args.label: Metro-North Railroad Committee part of Metro-North Railroad

payload.description: The Metro-North Railroad Committee is part of Metro-North Railroad.

tool_args.label: MTA published the 2026 Metro-North Railroad Committee Work Plan

payload.description: The work plan is published by the Metropolitan Transportation Authority.

payload.claim_text: The Work Plan will list, by month, the topics anticipated to be presented to the Committee for action or for information. The Committee will be advised if any changes have been made to the plan.
payload.subject: Work Plan

payload.claim_text: Materials presented to the Committee for review pertaining to certain agency initiatives and functions.
payload.subject: Information Items

payload.claim_text: Staff summary documents presented to the Board for approval of items affecting business standards and practices.
payload.subject: Action Items

payload.description: The January 2026 Operations Year in Review presentation is part of the Metro-North Railroad Committee schedule.
